name: Wake-Ewa (Black Eyed Beans with Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Black eyed peas, soaked & cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. First cut the onion in half. Grate 1 half and slice the rest finely.
2. Warm the oil in a pan and soften the onion slices.
3. Meanwhile, combine the grated onion, chili, coriander, and thyme with the tomatoes in a bowl.
4. Add this mixture to the cooked onion slices. Continue to cook gently for 10-15 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. After this, add the cooked black eyed peas, mash them slightly, then add sugar and salt. Mix everything well and cook briefly to heat all ingredients before serving with salad and rice or fufu (cassava mash).
